title: glycosmis trichanthera var. sumatrana
intro: Glycosmis trichanthera var. sumatrana is a plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family, commonly found in Southeast Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Glycosmis trichanthera var. sumatrana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical applications, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
